name: Young Heart
original_name: ใช่เธอหรือเปล่า
overview:
A romantic fantasy series about strangers who cross paths inside the VR game “Let’s School”, a simulated all-girls high school with only one rule: “Real identity must never be revealed.”

Joy – a creative from an agency, escaping the exhaustion of real life

Pan – a friend who reminds her of unresolved memories

Mean – a warm senior who brings her comfort

Praimai – a bright girl who pulls her out of her safe zone

But as feelings begin to grow…someone in the game seems to know who she really is.

Young Heart – Is it you? Because sometimes… the memories we forget might be waiting for us in a world we never expected.

trailers.title: Young Heart ใช่เธอหรือเปล่า | Pilot Series (Romantic Fantasy / GL)
